title: Master HTTP/2 & HTTP/3 Streaming
description: Utilize persistent streams in HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 to push data efficiently. Master HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 streaming to reduce handshake overhead and leverage native browser flow control.
objectives: Utilize persistent streams in HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 to push data efficiently.
Master HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 streaming to reduce handshake overhead and leverage native browser flow control.
